content.content: The cost to eat at New Asiaway is 30.0 euros, and at China Garden, it is 35.0 euros. For lunch, I recommend New Asiaway due to its higher rating of 4.6 compared to China Garden's 4.4. For dinner, China Garden provides a comfortable and spacious dining area with a wide selection of authentic Chinese dishes. Enjoy your meal!
